# Pull Request

## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Why

<!-- What problem does this solve? Was it an issue that was opened, an implementation pain, a misalignment you found? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Typo, formatting, or clarification (no semantic change)
- [ ] Additive change to a schema or the spec (backwards-compatible)
- [ ] Breaking change to a schema or the spec
- [ ] New pattern, scenario, or documentation
- [ ] Change to rationale, threat model, or scoring docs

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] For substantive changes, I opened an issue first and linked it below
- [ ] I've maintained the separation between pattern language and wire protocol
- [ ] I've updated `spec/CHANGELOG.md` if this is a spec change
- [ ] I've updated or added schema examples if this changes a schema
- [ ] I've validated any new example JSON against its schema
